name: luly-v0-3-1
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.3.1 (minor — schema accuracy, mobile/desktop, color application): (1) Layout-token fix — flow-level layout overrides use the renderer's suffixed keys `maxWidthDesktop` / `paddingDesktop` (+ `*Mobile`); the old bare `maxWidth` default was silently ignored and is dropped, so flows keep the app default desktop width (1480px) unless deliberately overridden. (2) Color application — luly-style now documents where key tokens actually render (quiz answer cards: `onSurface` unselected, `primaryLight` selected, `successLight` correct, `failureLight` wrong; `secondary` dark callouts with `textOnPrimary` text) and adds mandatory contrast targets for those answer-card and dark-callout pairs. (3) Per-viewport awareness — skills now reference the `*Mobile` style tokens and per-block margin model (`margin*` / `margin*Mobile`, defaults top 16 / bottom 0) as polishing levers for the future agentic-edit scope, explicitly NOT emitted during simple generation.
